_comment: LEGACY/REFERENCE — as of plugin 3.2.0, `claude plugin install reflect@agents-in-a-box` auto-wires SessionStart (recall + reflect-drain-bg.sh) and PreCompact hooks via plugin.json. This snippet is retained for (a) Codex/Copilot adapter consumers that don't speak the Claude plugin runtime, and (b) showing alternative PreCompact variants (`_PreCompact_full`, `_PreCompact_auto`). Do NOT copy SessionStart blocks here into Claude Code settings.json — they are duplicates of the auto-wired hooks.

SessionStart._comment: Phase 2: inject top-3 relevant learnings into new session context

hooks._comment: Option 2: Auto-reflect — queues the transcript so the *next* SessionStart agent runs /reflect on it. Requires the SessionStart drain hook below.

_PreCompact_full._comment: Option 3: Handover + backup + auto-reflect. CRITICAL: each command MUST be a separate hooks-array entry, NOT chained with &&. Hook stdin is consumed by the first reader, so chained commands silently lose the JSON event payload (only the last command sees stdin in a shell pipeline).

SessionStart._comment: Drain hook for Option 2/3 above: surfaces queued auto-reflections to the new agent via additionalContext, so the agent (which IS an LLM) can run /reflect on each transcript. Exits silently when the queue is empty.
